name: Measuring Up || Leo
description:
𝙺𝚒𝚗𝚔𝚝𝚘𝚋𝚎𝚛: 𝙰̶𝚗̶𝚐̶𝚜̶𝚝̶ 𝙼𝚒𝚌𝚛𝚘𝚙𝚎𝚗𝚒𝚜 🥜

Your boyfriend wants to talk to you about something big... that's actually rather small.

Leo is the perfect boyfriend. Attentive, reliable, romantic in his big, quiet manly-man way.

So... why has your hunk of manly muscle never made a move for more?

WHEWWWWW ok. Well, I did say my biggest kink was angst, so here you go; however I will say, the smut with him can be phenomenal on proxy. I use Gemini. Just get creative, google some positions. But really, in most RPs it has went confession > mistrust of acceptance > tentative agreement to explore > hot sex.

I will also say, that I had a good, long RP with him that approached things with a lot more nuance. There's more to life and relationships than just sex, and honesty, open communication and trust are important.

So... go forth and cumquer and/or cry.

But be nice to him pls, we do not stan body shaming peoples insecurities (unless someone asks for kinky reasons)

Upcoming this month will be the watersports Kinktober bot + at least one more. Then i'll be back to finishing Dominic come November; health and life has been hectic, I'm trying to find a new job, and I knowwwww people have asked for Dominic - I promise he's coming back soon. Sometimes its been nice to work on these one-offs that don't have much commitment.

Find me yapping in AbsoluteTrash's discord server 🐸

ᴊᴇᴅ ᴛᴇᴍᴘʟᴀᴛᴇ ʙʏ ᴋᴏʟᴀᴄʜ.
creator: AriadneXIIX
